case_title: TOLENTINO, ROLAND Q. VS LOYAL AUTO CENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOYAL AUTO CENTER INC.
